steps.title: Identify the defining criterion in the claim
steps.content: The claim says Joanna admires ambition “to the exclusion of all other qualities.” This means the winning quotation must show her valuing ONLY ambition/purpose, with indifference to other traits.

steps.title: Find the quotation demonstrating exclusion
steps.content: C demonstrates this directly: “Joanna was mightily interested in people who had a 'purpose' in life. Otherwise not at all.” The word “purpose” represents ambition, and “Otherwise not at all” shows she dismisses everyone lacking it—exclusion in action. A describes her own traits rather than what she values in others, B indicates family preference without explanation, and D portrays her valuing both ambition and work ethic. This matches choice C — C is correct.
